notes: Representative output captured from a local PerfCopilot analysis run.

parsed.summary: Version B is materially slower at larger input sizes while preserving the same O(n) scaling class.
parsed.best_fit_complexity: A best fit: O(n) (0.94) B best fit: O(n) (0.90)
regression_bullets: 38.66% slowdown at the largest measured input.
Memory growth increased alongside runtime growth, suggesting allocation overhead.
likely_causes: Higher per-record serialization work after the refactor.
Additional transient allocations in the hot loop.
evidence: Runtime delta widens as input size increases.
Memory B climbs from 15.0 to 42.5 across the sample set.
optimization_direction: Reduce repeated object creation in the serialization path.
Precompute or reuse structures where safe.
risks: Microbenchmark noise can hide small wins at low n.
